stemHtml: The Flight Management Computer (FMC) contains two primary databases: the navigation database and the performance database. What is the purpose of the navigation database?

options.a: It contains data used to calculate predictions for fuel used and estimated remaining fuel throughout a flight.
options.b: It provides navigational guidance and enable the aircraft to follow established flight procedures.
options.c: It integrates FMS positions with navigation data to provide navigational guidance during flight.
options.d: It stores route and instrument flight procedure information in the appropriate data format.
